memory.summary: The cohort's lunch invitation feels urgent compared to my unfinished analysis. I'll likely skip the work to prioritize our time together.

desires: Not feel like I'm abandoning the cohort at lunch and looking unreliable to them.
Keep this unfinished analysis out of my head so I can actually enjoy the meal without guilt.

goals.description: Join the cohort for lunch immediately to maintain trust and avoid feeling like an unreliable abandoner.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value is weighted highest (0.5); dropping this would cause significant social friction, which my avoidant nature makes me desperate to prevent. The guilt of letting them down outweighs the desire to finish analysis now.

goals.description: Consume the meal mindfully without checking the unfinished analysis, accepting that I will revisit it later to clear my head.
goals.rationale: I need to enjoy this connection with the close friend group (closeness: 7) without carrying the burden of the task into the moment. My deliberate time horizon means I can safely defer this specific emotional regulation to a later slot when I have more energy.
